name: Mind Thrust
description: Delivers a massive assault on a creature's thought pathways, dealing 1d10 points of damage.
augment: Each additional PP spent adds 1d10 damage. For each extra 2d10 damage, save DC increases by 1.

name: Energy Ray
description: Ranged touch attack ray deals 1d6 damage of a chosen energy type (cold, electricity, fire, or sonic). Deals an extra 1d6 at ML 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, 19.
augment: Each extra 2 PP adds +1d6 damage.

name: Inertial Armor
description: Tangible psychokinetic force creates armor that grants +4 armor bonus to AC. No max Dex penalty, no armor check penalty, no arcane failure. Incorporeal attacks are affected. Does not stack with mage armor.
augment: Each extra 2 PP increases armor bonus by +1.

name: Force Screen
description: Invisible mobile disk of force hovers in front of you, providing a +4 shield bonus to AC (applies against incorporeal touch attacks). Does not stack with a physical shield.
augment: Each extra 2 PP increases shield bonus by +1.

name: Crystal Shard
description: Ranged touch attack launches a razor-sharp crystal shard, dealing 1d6 piercing damage per two manifester levels (max 5d6).
augment: Each extra PP adds +1d6 piercing damage. Save DC to hit increases by 1 for each extra 2d6.

name: Astral Construct
description: Creates a 1st-level astral construct (Small, 15hp, slam +3 1d4+3, AC 18) of solidified ectoplasm that obeys mental commands as a free action. Construct level increases with additional PP spent (see EPH pp. 185-189 for stat blocks by level).
augment: Spend 2 additional PP to create next level construct (max 9th-level at ML 17+). Each level increases size, HP, attacks, and grants menu abilities.

name: Call to Mind
description: By meditating, you recall buried knowledge. On a failed Knowledge check, manifest this power to re-attempt with a +4 competence bonus.

name: Detect Psionics
description: Detects psionic auras in a 60-ft. cone. Round 1: presence/absence. Round 2: number and strength of auras. Round 3: location and discipline of each aura. Psicraft check to identify discipline.

name: Empathy
description: You detect the surface emotions of creatures in range. You know the presence and nature of emotions (fear, anger, joy, etc.) but not specific thoughts.
augment: Each extra PP increases range and area by 5 ft. Spend 2 extra PP to pinpoint one creature's exact emotional state.

name: Far Hand
area_or_target: One nonmagical unattended object up to 5 lb.
description: Mentally lift and move an object within range. Move it up to 15 ft./round as a move action. You cannot exert more force than a light grip.
augment: Each extra 2 PP increases max weight by 10 lb.

name: Missive
description: Send a one-way telepathic message of up to 10 words to a creature you can see. Target must share a language with you.

name: Telempathic Projection
description: Alter the subject's mood by projecting an emotion: friendly, curious, calmed, or fearful. Subject acts as if naturally experiencing that emotion. Does not control actions directly.

name: Precognition
description: Your mind glimpses fragments of likely near-future events. Gain a +2 insight bonus on a single attack roll, saving throw, or skill check made during the power's duration (declared before rolling).
augment: Each extra 3 PP grants an additional use of the bonus.

name: Skate
area_or_target: You or one willing creature or unattended object (up to 100 lb./level)
description: Affected creature or object slides along the ground at +15 ft. speed, taking no penalties for difficult terrain on flat surfaces. Cannot easily stop on smooth surfaces (must make DC 12 Balance check to halt intentionally).

name: Matter Agitation
area_or_target: 2 sq. ft. of surface area of object or creature
description: Excite atomic structure of a nonmagical, nonpsionic object or part of a creature. After concentration: round 1 warm; round 2 hot (1d4 fire/rd); round 3+ burning (2d4 fire/rd). Can ignite flammable materials.

name: Control Object
area_or_target: One unattended object up to 100 lb.
description: Animate an unattended object as if a puppeteer were inside it. Move it up to 20 ft./round. Can cause simple mechanical items (levers, buttons, doors) to operate. Objects with appendages can make unarmed attacks (BAB +5, 1d6 damage).

name: Animal Affinity
description: Forge a psychometabolic link with an idealized animal, granting +4 enhancement bonus to one ability score: Str, Dex, Con, Int, Wis, or Cha. Choose at manifestation.
augment: Each extra 5 PP improves the same score by an additional +2, or add one more ability score at +4. Cannot boost more than 4 scores at once.

name: Body Adjustment
description: Biofeedback allows you to heal 1d12 hp. Unlike magical healing, works on creatures that don't benefit from positive energy.
augment: Each extra 2 PP heals an additional 1d12 hp.

name: Chameleon
description: Your skin and equipment take on the color and texture of surroundings, granting +10 enhancement bonus on Hide checks.

name: Claws of the Beast
description: Grow natural claws: two attacks at full BAB, each 1d4+Str (1d6 Large, 1d3 Small). These are primary natural weapons if you have no other natural weapons.
augment: Spend 2 extra PP: claws deal 1d6 base. Spend 2 more: deal 1d8.

name: Empty Mind
description: Blank your mind to resist telepathic intrusion. Gain +2 bonus on Will saves against mind-affecting powers and effects for 1 round. Manifests as an immediate action (even on others' turns).
augment: Each extra PP extends duration by 1 round.

name: Expansion
description: Your body and gear grow one size category (Small→Medium→Large→Huge). Gain +2 Str, –2 Dex, +1 size AC/attack penalty, +5 natural armor. Space/reach increase accordingly.
augment: Each extra 6 PP increases an additional size category.

name: Feat Leech
description: Temporarily steal one of the target's feats. You gain use of a feat the target knows (your choice after a successful touch). Target loses access to that feat for the duration.
augment: Each extra 3 PP lets you steal one additional feat.

name: Hustle
description: Gain one extra move action this turn. Can be used to move, draw a weapon, or use any ability that requires a move action. Can only manifest once per round.

name: Metamorphosis
duration: 1 min./level (D) for creature; 1 hour/level (D) for object
description: Assume the form of any creature of your type (or object) from Fine to Huge size. Gain physical Str/Dex/Con of the assumed form, natural armor, natural attacks, and movement modes. Cannot gain supernatural abilities. Works like polymorph (PHB).

name: Psionic Lion's Charge
description: When you charge this round, you can make a full attack instead of a single attack. Must be manifested in the same round as the charge. Counts as one quickened power for the round.

name: Strength of My Enemy
description: Each melee hit you land against one designated target drains 1 point of Str from that target and adds +1 to your own Str (stacking, max +8). Drained Str returns when the power ends. You must designate the target when manifesting.
augment: Each extra PP extends max Str drain/gain by +2.

name: Id Insinuation
description: As confusion, except duration is concentration + 1 round. Swift tendrils of thought disrupt the target's unconscious. Each round the target rolls d100: 01-10 acts normally; 11-20 babbles; 21-50 does nothing; 51-70 flees; 71-100 attacks nearest creature.
augment: Each extra 2 PP allows you to target one additional creature.

name: Ectoplasmic Form
description: Become a translucent mass of rippling ectoplasm. Gain DR 10/psionics, become immune to poison and disease, resist fire/acid 10, can slip through cracks (no squeezing penalties). Cannot make physical attacks or manipulate objects, but can manifest powers.

name: Psionic Fly
description: Fly at a speed of 60 ft. (good maneuverability). Functions as psionic equivalent of fly spell.
augment: Spend 6 extra PP to affect one additional willing target with a touch.

name: Telekinetic Force
description: Move an object up to 25 lb./manifester level up to 20 ft./round as a move action. Attended objects allow owner a Will save. Can hold objects stationary (opposed Str check to remove), hurl for damage (as appropriate melee or ranged weapon), or manipulate precisely.
augment: Each extra PP increases weight limit by 25 lb.

name: Death Urge
description: Plant a death-urge impulse. On the subject's next turn it seeks the fastest way to end its life: jumps off cliffs, attacks multiple foes, runs into hazards, drops weapons and provokes. Effectively controlled for 1 round.
augment: Each extra 3 PP extends duration by 1 round.

name: Psychic Crush
description: Establish a psionic link and crush the subject's mental essence, dealing 3d6 damage (no save). On a failed Will save (DC 15+Int mod), the subject drops to –1 hp and is dying. On a successful save, subject takes the 3d6 and no other effect.
augment: Each extra PP increases damage by 1d6.

name: Ultrablast
description: Release a horrid psionic shriek that deals 13d6 psychic damage to all creatures in range. Both psionic and nonpsionic creatures are affected. You are immune to your own ultrablast.
augment: Each extra PP adds 1d6 damage.

name: Disintegrate, Psionic
description: Thin green ray; ranged touch attack. Creature hit takes 22d6 damage; reduced to 0 or fewer HP = turned to fine dust (Fortitude negates dust, still takes 22d6). Objects take 22d6 damage (Fortitude negates). Functions as psionic version of disintegrate.
augment: Each extra 2 PP deals +2d6 damage.

name: Time Regression
description: Rewind time 1 round. All events of that round are undone (your actions and everyone else's). Only you retain memory of the previous round's events. You can act on foreknowledge during the replayed round. XP cost: 1,000 XP.

name: Genesis
area_or_target: A demiplane coterminous with the Astral Plane
description: Create a finite, self-contained, demiplanar pocket realm. Start with a 180-ft.-radius sphere. Environment: air, earth, temperature, and seasons are set at creation. Can be expanded with repeated manifestation. XP cost: 1,000 XP.

name: Psionic Dominate
description: Establish mental control over a humanoid subject. Issue commands mentally (free action). Subject obeys to the best of its ability. Orders to harm itself or loved ones require a new Will save. Functions as dominate person.
augment: Spend 2 extra PP to affect any creature type (not just humanoid). Spend 2 PP to extend duration to permanent (still ends at death). Each extra PP adds +1 to save DC.

name: Psionic Charm
description: The target views you as a trusted friend and ally. Functions as charm person. Affects humanoids only in base form.
augment: Spend 2 extra PP to affect any creature type. Each extra PP increases duration by 1 hour. Spend 4 PP to make the duration 1 day/level.

name: Dissolution
description: Your body becomes partially discorporated for 1 round, gaining concealment (20% miss chance) as you partially phase out. Your attacks and touch powers still function normally.
augment: Each extra 2 PP extends duration by 1 round.

name: Ego Whip
description: Lash the target's ego, dealing 1d4 Cha damage. On a failed Will save, target is also shaken for 1 round per point of Cha damage dealt.
augment: Each extra 3 PP increases Cha damage by 1d4.

name: Brain Lock
description: The subject is locked in mental stasis: cannot take any actions, cannot move, and loses its Dex bonus to AC. Held target is not helpless (still aware, still benefits from existing defenses).
augment: Spend 2 extra PP to affect any creature type.

name: Concussion Blast
description: Wave of mental concussion deals 1d6+1 damage to target, no save, no attack roll required. Affects incorporeal creatures (force damage).
augment: Each extra 2 PP adds +1d6+1 damage and may target one additional creature.

name: Energy Bolt
description: Blast of energy chosen from cold, electricity, fire, or sonic deals 5d6 damage (same type as chosen energy) along a 120-ft. line.
augment: Each extra PP adds 1d6 damage. Save DC increases by 1 for each extra 2d6.

name: Mindlink
description: Establish a two-way telepathic link with another creature. Both can communicate complex thoughts and images; no shared language needed. Link can be used across any distance while it lasts.
augment: Each extra 2 PP allows linking to one additional creature.

name: Psionic Suggestion
description: Compel a creature to carry out a short, reasonable-sounding suggestion (one or two sentences). Equivalent to suggestion spell. Suicidal orders negate automatically.
augment: Each extra 3 PP allows targeting one additional creature.

name: Psionic Teleport
area_or_target: You and touched objects or creatures
description: Teleport yourself and up to (your ML × 50 lb.) of carried gear, or yourself plus one willing Medium or smaller creature, instantly to any known destination. Table-based chance of mishap if destination is imprecisely known. Equivalent to teleport spell.
augment: Each extra 2 PP allows bringing one additional person.

name: Clairvoyant Sense
description: Designate a familiar location. You can see and hear that location as if physically present. Range unlimited for known locations. A scrying sensor appears at the target location (Intelligence 12+ to notice on DC 20).

name: Energy Missile
area_or_target: Up to five targets, no two more than 15 ft. apart
description: Unleash up to five missiles of chosen energy type (cold, electricity, fire, or sonic), each dealing 3d6 damage. Each missile targets a different creature.
augment: Each extra PP adds +1d6 damage per missile. Each extra 4 PP adds one additional missile (max 5 total).

name: Adapt Body
description: Biologically adapt to any environment: breathe underwater or in vacuum, survive extreme temperatures, reduce pressure damage, see in darkness, gain acid/fire/cold resistance 20, and become immune to gas-based effects.

name: Mind Probe
description: Extract information from a subject's mind. Each round of concentration, make an opposed Bluff/Sense Motive check. On success, pull one piece of information of your choosing from the subject. Target is aware of the probing if it makes a Sense Motive (DC 15).

name: Psionic Dimension Door
area_or_target: You and touched objects or touched willing creatures
description: Instantly transfer yourself and up to 50 lb. of objects (or one willing Medium creature) to any location within range you can see or visualize. Functions as dimension door.
augment: Each extra 4 PP allows bringing one additional Medium or smaller creature.
